entries.summary: Phase 3 drift verification: All 5 tasks (3.1-3.5) verified ALIGNED. Next.js 15→16 upgrade complete (next@16.2.4, eslint-config-next@16.2.4, eslint@9.39.4). Flat eslint config created (eslint.config.mjs). Turbopack defaults work without changes. Build, type-check, lint, and 75 tests all pass. No drift detected.
